title: Leaving Dressrosa
description: Luffy’s allies prepare to escape while Fujitora and the Marines make their move.
scene: On pages 4–8, Rebecca, King Riku, Fujitora, Sengoku, Tsuru deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Third day since the end of the battle

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: waves race across Dressrossa ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Straw Hat is still in this country!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes. We've confirmed it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Dress- Rosa, South Coast

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's quite severely injured, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I heard about that Prostrate apology of yours! And your spat with Sakazuki!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Quiet, old man Okaki!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Inspectors never have anything to do anyway, quit getting ahead of yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: WAHAHA! Boy, am I sure glad I ain't fleet Admiral anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Marine HQ, Inspector, Sengoku the Buddha

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Admiral Fujitora... Why aren't you pursuing those pirates?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Marine HQ, Vice-Admiral, Great Staff Officer, Tsuru

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The severely wounded pirate that saved this country... should I make an enemy out of him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: slump

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Or should I let him remain, to this country, a hero?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A die!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This is not a game, Isshow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You tellin' me you've been decidin' with that thing this whole time!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: a man with nothing has twice been saved by this "thing."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Today is the third day. Let us see what it says. I have not cheated.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I thank you for taking care of the heavenly demon's guarded convoy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: However, this area is still under my jurisdiction; I must ask to you to allow me to use my own methods.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Oi! Me too! I want noodles too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Ah! I'll get that ready right away.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: O-TSURU- San...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Please... do the Honors for today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: If we get anything besides a one, we move to take law and Straw Hat's heads at once.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Please, don't forget about the kenpo!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Ah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: So you've come today as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Everyone from the Marines, help me with the kenpopo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Oh my, how adorable!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: A dwarf, if I'm not mistaken!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I'm manshelly of the Tontatta Tribe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: You don't see that everyday!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Have more respect, you big louts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Lady Manshelly is the Honorable daughter of Chief Tonta!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: She is a princess!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Actually, here on dress- Rosa...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: We're not supposed to show ourselves to anyone save the royal family,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: but I wanted to, in secret, come here and heal everyone's wounds... and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Hmm... how?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Central District

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Today... on this day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: our king returns!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: that's right! After a span of 10 years, he has declared that he will return to the throne!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: King Riku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: King Riku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: King Riku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Anyone knows

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: The country's quite amped up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: tricked by a pirate, they hated their king...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: and though at one time they wanted naught but wealth and power,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Having come face- to-face with the horrors of death,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: They now wish with all their hearts for peace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: It would be funny if it wasn't all so tragic...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: No one could find this funny...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: In all honesty, I'm so glad they managed to make it through all of that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: I wonder whether or not I have it in me to make them happy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: Would that I were a godlike King that could sweep aside even storms with a wave of my hand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: Oi, don't get ahead of yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: I'm joking.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: I will continue giving it my best.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #62
dialogue.text: That is all I know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #63
dialogue.text: Until the day I give this throne over...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #64
dialogue.text: to Rebecca.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #65
dialogue.text: Speaking of which... are you really okay with that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #66
dialogue.text: Am I the only one that remembers how strong-willed scarlet was in her younger days?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #67
dialogue.text: just what are 8 you imply- ing!?

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
